title: Asveora Unified Identity Model (AUIM)
description: Canonical cross-schema contract defining how CIR, PIK, VSIG, APA, AUID, and RGBSIG relate. This model is the highest-precedence identity specification. All identity-related schemas MUST conform to it.

identity_model_version.description: Version of the unified identity model specification.

cir.description: Canonical Identity Record (CIR). Root authority record in the identity system.

pik_ref.description: Reference to PIK (Primary Identity Key). MUST NOT be embedded key material.

vsig_ref.description: Reference to VSIG object. MUST NOT be inline signature data.

apa_ref.description: Reference to APA object. MUST resolve to APA schema entity.

pik.description: Primary Identity Key (PIK) model definition. Cryptographic root identity anchor.

cir_binding.description: CIR this PIK is bound to. PIK cannot exist outside CIR scope.

vsig.description: Verification Signature (VSIG). Non-authoritative verification artifact bound to PIK and CIR.

apa.description: Asveora Profile Address (APA). Addressing layer for identity resolution. Non-authoritative.

auid.description: Asveora Unified Identity Descriptor (AUID). DERIVED ONLY. NEVER stored as authoritative data. Format: [APA]=[PIK]-[VSIG].

rgbsig.description: Human-only activity proof artifact. NON-AUTHORITATIVE. MUST NOT be used in identity resolution, CIR, PIK, VSIG, or AUID computation.

allOf.description: Enforce strict separation: RGBSIG MUST NOT influence identity core objects.
AUID must remain derived-only and not referenced inside CIR as stored authority data beyond representation.
